case_title: BRANDY MORRISON VS. U CALL COMMUNICATIONS/CALLING CARD KING, A et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORRISON, BRANDY AS TO DEFENDANT U CALL COMMUNICATIONS/CALLING CARD KING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP FAIRCHILD, RICHARD IND AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF U CALL COMMUNICATIONS/CALLING CARD KING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP CHU, JACK IND AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF U CALL COMMUNICATIONS/CALLING CARD KING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORRISON, BRANDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT U CALL COMMUNICATIONS/CALLING CARD KING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP FAIRCHILD, RICHARD IND AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF U CALL COMMUNICATIONS/CALLING CARD KING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP CHU, JACK IND AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF U CALL COMMUNICATIONS/CALLING CARD KING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $5,338.03 PRINCIPAL, $32.84 INTEREST, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,474.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
